feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: What's your favourite Superhero Movies? Mine is Man of Steel, the cinematography…
entry.content: What's your favourite Superhero Movies? Mine is Man of Steel, the cinematography, fight scenes, score, costume, casting, tones, suit, writing and small things like Kal cradling that solider's head when he falls out the helicopter or when the kryptonians knock him out while tag teaming him. Its also wild how it matches up to BvS perfectly, everything in MoS is coherant and it feels right https://youtu.be/9jt2lSNDPWA?si=pjO 40MKwtDg4TmtC https://youtu.be/IYdg1Y8S0N0?si=ldk 3GaC4YHlm9kY4 https://yo

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: So am I meant to take this seriously? Just a bunch of manchildren yelling anime …

So hebdoes his super attack then has to go to school or his mum has called him down for tea? So a bunch of jeets in new dheli coded a bunch of levels and super powers for kids to use in a game is deep? Like shy the fuck are you crying just reset the game lmao What a retarded concept

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2942
entry.content: >https://youtu.be/aNddW2xmZp8 Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83865452 >Scripts to check image

entry.title: /int/ International: Finland - NOT the happiest country
entry.content: Can you stop with the "happiest country on Earth" bullshit? I'm sick of foreigners telling me how great my country must be because they saw a Tiktok video. Facts: >Finland is the most unemployed country in Europe >Finland is also the poorest country in Europe - the average Finnish adult under 34 owns 5k euros (what an American floor mopper makes a month) I'm convinced Finland is the darkest and most depressing hellhole on Earth and if I could afford it, I'd escape this place

entry.title: /o/ Auto: bring back the Solara TRD convertible and coupe, but this time with a 400 hp sup…
entry.content: bring back the Solara TRD convertible and coupe, but this time with a 400 hp supercharged V6 https://www.caranddriver.com/review s/a71732269/2001-toyota-camry-solar a-trd-archive-test/ A less restrictive muffler ($391) adds an engagingly mellow tone to the Solara's exhaust note, as well as "three to four horsepower" to the output of the stock engine, according to TRD. However, the real zinger in our test car's inventory was an Eaton supercharger kit that whistles up an extra 49 horsepower and 30

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Being a mixed person is just like being a mutt
entry.content: People will treat you badly for being mixed and from a undesirable breed, you live your whole life wishing you were a husky or a golden retriever. And people will tell you "You will never be white, you will die mixed, you scum." I don't need to tell you what are the advantages of being a white person. People choose to be gay, trans, make tattoos, but they don't choose their race, their phenotype. I wish I could have Germanic phenotype, I have Levantine phenotype, which is not even European. Peop

Post trans, post about trans, and quite possibly post with trans. Post about trannies, gush about trannies, worship trannies, and masturbate to trannies. entry.title: /v/ Video Games: He has done it again, lads. That was Gaben intent from the get-go. Valve wanted …
entry.content: He has done it again, lads. That was Gaben intent from the get-go. Valve wanted the Steam Machines to be a form factor and incentivize other to join the market on their own terms, to promote competition.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8354 Treason Day Edition Previous Thread: >>83853880 F-l…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8354 Treason Day Edition Previous Thread: >>83853880 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profil

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Prediction: much of old YouTube will be deleted in time
entry.content: Archive those classics sooner rather than later assuming they haven't been deleted already YouTube will inevitably begin pruning "useless" content on their platform ie. old videos with less than N number of views or entire accounts that haven't logged-in in N years (with the exception of accounts clearly tied to business or gov't, maybe this is the caveat that sinks the whole theory)

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Please help I'm losing it
entry.content: I've got a 2016 ram 1500 5.7l v8, just got it knowing about the misfire. (Cylinder 6). It was a dead miss at all times, swapped plugs and coils, no difference. Pulled the rocker cover, found the intake valve barely moving. Sure enough it needed lifters and cams (intake lobe for cylinder 6 was completely worn off) I replaced the camshaft, lifters, and mds solenoids (even pulled out the magnets underneath them to clean off the metal shavings) and I still have a misfire on cylinder 6 at idle. I pul

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Should this be legal? It's impossible for them to consent to eating candy becaus…
entry.content: Should this be legal? It's impossible for them to consent to eating candy because their brains aren't fully developed and so they cannot comprehend the wider effects of eating candy, many of which are long-term. They rely on adults to provide it for them, so there's obviously a power imbalance there.

entry.content: >Pearl Harbor’s Revenge Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I want my 26 hours back.What a shitty sequel. The first game is half as short, i…
entry.content: I want my 26 hours back.What a shitty sequel. The first game is half as short, it's simple, sweet novelty fun. The second game barely improves over the 1st game in gameplay department so ends up being too long for how shallow the gameplay mechanics are.
